description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating black and gray marble-like stripes running parallel across its top surface. The stripes are evenly spaced and extend the full width of the block, creating a visually striking, high-contrast appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern look. The block is relatively low in height compared to its length and width, suggesting it is designed as a barrier or obstacle rather than a step or seat. The surface appears hard and smooth, with no visible signs of weathering or damage. There are no engravings, markings, or interactive components visible on any side.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating black and gray marble-like stripes on top and solid black sides, giving it a modern, bold appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface and solid black front face, with the stripes running horizontally.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the block and the vertical orientation of the stripes from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped top and solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and vertical stripes, mirroring view 1.
attribute_location_context: modern urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated, likely used as a standalone barrier or decorative block
